text_raw: You masterpieces, wrought by divine hands!
text_clean: You masterpieces, wrought by divine hands!

text_raw: Your radiant smiles put the sun to shame...!
text_clean: Your radiant smiles put the sun to shame...!

text_raw: How could my heart ever choose?
text_clean: How could my heart ever choose?

text_raw: I'm but a faithful butterfly, loyal to a single bloom!
text_clean: I'm but a faithful butterfly, loyal to a single bloom!

text_raw: Must you always cast a pall over everything?!
text_clean: Must you always cast a pall over everything?!

text_raw: Without beauty, my heart forgets its rhythm!
text_clean: Without beauty, my heart forgets its rhythm!

text_raw: The lantern I thought snuffed out burns still,
text_clean: The lantern I thought snuffed out burns still,

text_raw: and the heartbeat lapsed into long silence stirs again.
text_clean: and the heartbeat lapsed into long silence stirs again.

text_raw: Spring returns to my once-hollow chest...
text_clean: Spring returns to my once-hollow chest...

text_raw: You'd sour the wine at a wedding!
text_clean: You'd sour the wine at a wedding!

text_raw: Anyway, Hernand's Howling Hill... I've got a good feeling.
text_clean: Anyway, Hernand's Howling Hill... I've got a good feeling.

text_raw: Then I'd best ready myself to tend their petals.
text_clean: Then I'd best ready myself to tend their petals.

text_raw: I just know the effort it takes... to coax those petals open.
text_clean: I just know the effort it takes... to coax those petals open.

text_raw: Indeed, down this path lies a hill demanding heaps of it.
text_clean: Indeed, down this path lies a hill demanding heaps of it.

text_raw: Right. So you count each woman as a separate petal?
text_clean: Right. So you count each woman as a separate petal?

text_raw: What are you plotting this time?
text_clean: What are you plotting this time?

text_raw: Your brilliance, your shimmer—wait, {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Kliff#Kliff}? Don't you dare leave me mid-verse!
text_clean: Your brilliance, your shimmer—wait, {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Kliff#Kliff}? Don't you dare leave me mid-verse!

text_raw: Ho! Look how the heavens smile upon us!
text_clean: Ho! Look how the heavens smile upon us!

text_raw: Aye. A veritable crown of jewels, fit for a queen.
text_clean: Aye. A veritable crown of jewels, fit for a queen.

text_raw: Look how they sparkle with splendor!
text_clean: Look how they sparkle with splendor!

text_raw: shades of cerulean that put the sea to shame.
text_clean: shades of cerulean that put the sea to shame.

text_raw: dappling the earth with viridian hues.
text_clean: dappling the earth with viridian hues.

text_raw: How could anyone tire of such a sight?
text_clean: How could anyone tire of such a sight?

text_raw: This is what you were talking about?
text_clean: This is what you were talking about?

text_raw: Don't ask me. You've got the pickaxe.
text_clean: Don't ask me. You've got the pickaxe.
